bio: The Weeknd took over pop music & culture on his own terms filtering R&B, Pop,& hip-hop through an ambitious widescreen lens. The multi-platinum 4X GRAMMY Award winner has emerged as one of the most successful & significant artists of the modern era.

rows: One Of The Girls (with JENNIE, Lily Rose Depp)
